title: Lesson 638: お菜, 拝む, お代わり...

items.gloss: small dish (usu. one of several accompanying rice); side dish; fill; fill-in (drumming); jack-off material; something to masturbate to

to assume the posture of praying; to press the palms and fingers of both hands together; to do reverence (e.g. before a statue of the Buddha); to pay one's respects; to beg; to make a supplication; to see (something or someone of high status)
another helping; second helping; seconds; refill; command to have dog place its second paw in one's hand
to supplement; to make up for; to compensate for; to cover (a shortage, loss, etc.); to fill (e.g. a vacancy)
my sympathies; that's too bad; my condolences
outside near the door to one's home
